Introduction to Crosby County

( \n\n for paragraphs)

Arrows in Crosby County

Arrow #2: Crosbyton

More Details for Arrow #2

Coordinates: 33.6583061, -101.2329332

Installed: August 10, 2011

Dedicated: July 31, 2012

Marker Text:

Quanah Parker hunted in Blanco Canyon & with Comanches fought the U.S. Cavalry northeast of Crosbyton

Get Directions via Google Maps

Arrow #40: Crosbyton

More Details for Arrow #40

Location: Located on the north side of the Crosby County Pioneer Memorial Museum

Address: 101 W Main St, Crosbyton, TX

Coordinates: 33.6596468, -101.2388812

Installed: November 20, 2012

Marker Text:

None

Get Directions via Google Maps

Welcome to the Quanah Parker Trail!

Explore the historical arrow markers commemorating Quanah Parker and the Comanche people across the Texas Plains Trail Region. Use the map on the homepage or navigate via the menu to learn more about this effort.
